items.name: micto/activity-timeline
items.title: Activity Timeline
items.description: A composable and data-driven timeline component for document routing history and audit trails.

items.name: micto/confirm-dialog
items.title: Confirm Dialog
items.description: A global, stacked confirmation system with a promise-based API and async support.

items.name: micto/data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A fully-featured, generic data table built on TanStack Table v8. Supports server/client pagination, sorting, search, and visibility.

items.name: micto/document-viewer
items.title: DocumentViewer
items.description: A feature-rich, responsive, and composable document viewing component system.

items.name: micto/file-uploader
items.title: File Uploader
items.description: A beautiful drag-and-drop file uploader supporting local accumulation and async uploads.

items.name: micto/permission-guard
items.title: Permission Guard
items.description: A premium RBAC and wildcard permission gating suite.

items.name: micto/search-select
items.title: Search Select
items.description: A beautiful searchable combobox supporting single/multi selection.

items.name: micto/server-pagination
items.title: Server Pagination
items.description: A universal pagination component tailored for standard React and Next.js.

items.name: micto/table-toolbar
items.title: Table Toolbar
items.description: A beautiful reactive grid toolbar that smoothly morphs filters into bulk action trays.

items.name: inertia/inertia-pagination
items.title: Inertia Pagination
items.description: A high-performance pagination component optimized for Laravel and Inertia.js responses.

items.name: hooks/use-table-query
items.title: Query
items.description: A high-performance TanStack Query wrapper for DataTable that manages server-side pagination, sorting, and searching state automatically.

items.name: micto/tabbed-view
items.title: Tabbed View
items.description: A container component that organizes content into distinct, selectable panels, allowing users to switch between different views within the same window.

items.name: micto/metric-card
items.title: Metric Card
items.description: A KPI card that displays a primary value, a trend indicator, and an optional sparkline chart.

items.name: micto/daily-time-record
items.title: Daily Time Record
items.description: A highly-detailed visual log grid for employee attendance, featuring calculated stats, weekend/holiday highlighting, and interactive log adjustments.

items.name: micto/salary-grade-explorer
items.title: Salary Grade Explorer
items.description: A highly-detailed government salary grade matrix browser, payroll contribution simulator, and visual pay slip previewer.
